implementing_department: Department of Women Development and Social Welfare, Government of West Bengal
description: Conditional cash transfer scheme to encourage education and delay marriage among adolescent girls.
eligibility: Enrolled in a recognized educational institution
Family income not exceeding ₹1,20,000 per annum

steps: Obtain application form from educational institution
Open a bank account in applicant's name
Submit filled form and documents to Head of Institution

additional_notes: Relaxed income criteria for specially-abled and orphan girls.
